findings.title: Deleted user lookup now skips tenant scope
findings.failure_scenario: A workspace admin can request a user id from another workspace and receive profile data because the new query filters only by id.

evidence.reason: The changed query uses id without workspaceId after the diff removed the scoped helper.

verification.summary: Base used the scoped helper; head queries by id only. A cross-workspace request reaches the changed path.
notes: Static verification only in this sample.

findings.suggested_fix_direction: Restore workspaceId scoping or call the scoped helper.
